description_long: This house complex features a modern architectural design with multiple interconnected rectangular structures, flat roofs, and extensive use of glass for natural lighting. The main building is accompanied by several smaller outbuildings, all set within a landscaped plot that includes green lawns and paved walkways. The property is bordered by wide streets, with driveways and parking areas integrated into the layout. Solar panels are visible on the main roof, indicating a focus on sustainability. The windows are large and arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The entryway is defined by a covered porch and a prominent pathway leading from the street.
description: A modern, multi-structure house complex with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped lawns, and solar panels, set alongside wide urban streets.
description_view_0: From this view, the main house and its outbuildings are seen from above, highlighting the green lawns, paved walkways, and the intersection of two wide streets.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the elongated side of the main building, the flat roofs, and the solar panels, with the outbuildings and lawns extending to the left.
description_view_2: Here, the rear of the main house and the separation between the main structure and outbuildings are visible, along with the street layout and parking areas.
description_view_3: The front of the house is prominent, showing the main entryway, covered porch, and the arrangement of the buildings along the intersecting streets.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a prominent pathway, modern door, and minimalistic landscaping
